title: Fencing Token Persistent State
description: Per-resource monotonic fencing-token state. Survives claim release (the claim record is deleted on release, but this state file is retained so the token authority for a resource outlives any single claim lifetime). See docs/COORDINATION.md §4 Fencing Token.

schema_version.description: Schema version literal. Breaking changes ship as fencing-state.schema.v2.json.

resources.description: Map of resource_id → per-resource token state. Keys are claim resource_ids (same validation surface as claim.schema.v1.json::resource_id).

next_token.description: Next token to issue on the next acquire or takeover of this resource. Strictly monotonic; never reset; never wraps (unbounded Python int). After issuing, incremented and CAS-written.

last_owner_agent_id.description: Agent that most recently released or lost the claim. Audit-only; NOT consulted for authority decisions.

last_released_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent release (either owner-initiated or takeover). Audit-only.
